allow: PowerShell(node scripts\\check-extension-js.mjs; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(node scripts\\seed-model-prices.mjs > scripts\\seed-model-prices.sql; Get-Content scripts\\seed-model-prices.sql -TotalCount 4; \(Get-Item scripts\\seed-model-prices.sql\).Length)
PowerShell(Remove-Item scripts\\seed-model-prices.mjs, scripts\\seed-model-prices.sql -Confirm:$false; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
